scripts.cf:project:create: wrangler pages project create nara-lockboard --production-branch main
scripts.cf:db:verify: wrangler d1 execute nara-lockboard --remote --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;"
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name nara-lockboard
scripts.deploy:cf:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name nara-lockboard --branch main
